name: Swedish Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in the container of a blender or food processor fitted with a steel blade.
2. Process for 1 minute, scraping down sides with a rubber spatula if needed.
3. Continue processing for an additional 30 seconds.
4. Transfer to a well-sealed container and allow to stand overnight before using.
Makes 3/4 cup.
